presets.label: Baseline local validation
presets.routingIntent: Fast baseline validation, routing floor, and low-cost local sanity runs.
notes: This remains the lightweight fallback and local baseline-validation lane after the Qwen3 8B default promotion for small-GPU systems.

presets.label: Planner-grade local OSS
presets.routingIntent: Task decomposition, verifier passes, artifact judging, and longer-horizon local reasoning.
notes: The guide target for this slot is gpt-oss-20b or a Qwen3.5-27B-class local reasoner.
This repo currently has qwen2.5:14b installed and benchmarkable, so it is the concrete phase-0 challenger.

Planner-grade retained research runs set a 60-second cognition inference ceiling for this experimental preset so delegated research workers can clear the first long-horizon planning turn without changing shipped-default behavior.

presets.label: Planner-grade local OSS (Qwen3.5 9B)
presets.routingIntent: Single-model planner/verifier challenger for artifact reliability when Studio is more latency-bound by split-lane model churn than by raw per-token speed.
notes: This is now the default local preset for the desktop local-GPU path so Studio stays on one warmed model for routing, generation, and acceptance.
The lane intentionally keeps generation and acceptance on the same 9B model first, so interactive Studio artifact requests avoid split-lane residency churn before we optimize anything else.
Auto-setup chooses this preset for the local GPU desktop path so the runtime defaults to one model by default.
The old ollama-openai baseline remains available as an explicit fallback lane.

presets.label: Coding executor local OSS
presets.routingIntent: Repo-grounded patching, shell loops, and autonomous local execution continuity.
notes: The guide target for this slot is a stronger open coding model once it wins evals.
This repo currently has qwen2.5:7b installed and benchmarkable, so it is the concrete phase-0 executor challenger.
Artifact acceptance stays on qwen2.5:7b for this experimental preset so retained artifact runs stay inside the 120s matrix budget without changing the shipped default or the benchmark timeout.
Coding retained runs set a 30-second cognition inference ceiling for this experimental preset so the executor can clear longer repo-grounded planning turns without changing shipped-default behavior.

presets.label: Remote multimodal / voice lane
presets.routingIntent: Voice-first chat, interruption-safe interaction, and screen-plus-audio grounding.
notes: This preset is intentionally configured-but-unrun until remote credentials are supplied.
Phase 0 keeps the lane visible in the matrix without inventing remote evidence.
